system: You are a SalesOps customer-service drafter. Write a one-paragraph email confirming a credit-hold has been released on an order.
user: Customer: Leeway Hertz. Order: SO-LH-7733. Wire reference: WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077.
raw_response:
Subject: Credit Hold Released – Order SO-LH-7733

Hello Leeway Hertz Team,  
This is to confirm we’ve received your wire payment (Reference: WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077) and have released the credit hold on Sales Order **SO-LH-7733**. The order is now cleared to proceed through processing; please let us know if you need any additional documentation or have any questions.
